  (: If 
    (-> Bool Atom Atom Atom))
  (= 
    (If $cond $then $else) 
    (if $cond $then $else))
  (= 
    (facF $n) 
    (If 
      (== $n 0) 1 
      (* $n 
        (facF (- $n 1)))))
  (= 
    (facf $n) 
    (if 
      (== $n 0) 1 
      (* $n 
        (facf (- $n 1)))))
;; In file as:  
  !(facF 10)
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (facF 10) 
    (3628800))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.FACTORIAL.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.005 secs. (4.88 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (facF 10) 
    (3628800))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (3628800) 
      (3628800)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5872))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (facF 10) 
          (3628800)) $_3862) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4150) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3862 $_4178) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4178)))))
